blockers.description: top_techniques always empty — connector-mitre has not populated OpenCTI ATT&CK data
docker compose build requires --profile platform due to opencti dependency

decisions.decision: TIM not ready to offer to clients
decisions.rationale: missing persistence, alerting, enrichment, SOAR, RBAC

decisions.decision: Target buyer: mid-market SOC with existing OpenCTI, cant send data to cloud
decisions.rationale: local LLM + semantic search is real differentiator for air-gap clients

decisions.decision: Improvement priority: persistence then alerting then feeds then enrichment
decisions.rationale: persistence is lowest effort / highest impact for demo stability

next_action: Run ./scripts/tim-check.sh to confirm state, then start briefing persistence (SQLite)
context_notes: Phase 6 complete. Two post-execution bugs found and fixed. User evaluating TIM as client offering, assessed not ready, improvement backlog defined. User noted frustration with agent spinning on docker operations that should be handed off immediately.
